description: Build QuantCalendar frontend - complete Next.js app with calendar views (month/week/day/agenda), event CRUD UI, mini-calendar, sidebar with multiple calendars
steps: Update apps/quantcalendar/package.json: add next, react, react-dom, @tanstack/react-query to dependencies. Add @types/react, @types/react-dom, autoprefixer, postcss, tailwindcss to devDependencies. Update scripts to: dev='next dev --port 3004', build='next build', start='next start', typecheck='tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.backend.json'
Replace apps/quantcalendar/tsconfig.json with Next.js-compatible config (copy pattern from apps/quantmail/tsconfig.json, keep @quant/* paths including shared-ui and common)
Create apps/quantcalendar/next.config.mjs: transpilePackages=['@quant/shared-ui','@quant/common'], output='standalone'
Create apps/quantcalendar/tailwind.config.ts: content=['./src/**/*.{ts,tsx}','../../packages/shared-ui/src/**/*.{ts,tsx}'], darkMode='class', extend colors with quant primary/secondary
Create apps/quantcalendar/postcss.config.mjs: plugins { tailwindcss, autoprefixer }
Create apps/quantcalendar/src/app/globals.css with Tailwind directives and CSS variables (copy from quantmail)
Create apps/quantcalendar/src/app/layout.tsx with Inter font, metadata title='QuantCalendar', QueryProvider wrapper
Create apps/quantcalendar/src/app/error.tsx with Button from @quant/shared-ui (copy pattern from quantmail)
Create apps/quantcalendar/src/app/loading.tsx with Skeleton from @quant/shared-ui
Create apps/quantcalendar/src/providers/query-provider.tsx (copy pattern from quantmail)
Create apps/quantcalendar/src/hooks/useEvents.ts - useQuery hook for fetching events from /api/events
Create apps/quantcalendar/src/hooks/useCalendars.ts - useQuery hook for fetching calendars
Create apps/quantcalendar/src/components/CalendarSidebar.tsx - sidebar with calendar list, mini-calendar, smart scheduling button. Use Sidebar from @quant/shared-ui
Create apps/quantcalendar/src/components/MiniCalendar.tsx - small month grid with today highlighting and date selection
Create apps/quantcalendar/src/components/CalendarGrid.tsx - main grid layout that renders events in time slots
Create apps/quantcalendar/src/components/EventCard.tsx - event display card with color coding, time, title
Create apps/quantcalendar/src/components/EventForm.tsx - modal/dialog form for creating/editing events using FormField, Input, TextArea, Select, Button from @quant/shared-ui
Create apps/quantcalendar/src/components/MonthView.tsx - month grid with day cells containing event pills
Create apps/quantcalendar/src/components/WeekView.tsx - 7-column time grid with hourly slots
Create apps/quantcalendar/src/components/DayView.tsx - single-column time grid with hourly slots
Create apps/quantcalendar/src/components/AgendaView.tsx - list view of upcoming events grouped by day

Create apps/quantcalendar/src/app/page.tsx - main page with AppShell, CalendarSidebar, view switcher (month/week/day/agenda tabs), today button, navigation arrows, and the selected view component. Use React state for current view/date.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm typecheck passes including @quant/quantcalendar typecheck task
pnpm build passes including @quant/quantcalendar next build
All components use @quant/shared-ui where applicable (Button, Input, FormField, AppShell, Sidebar, etc.)
No inline mock data arrays - all data comes from useQuery hooks
Semantic HTML with appropriate ARIA attributes
